description:
This is a sealed Perfect World Shanghai 2024 CS2 Major Championship viewer pass. Once this pass is unsealed, it will provide you with the Shanghai 2024 Coin tracking your progress throughout the event, full access to the Shanghai 2024 Pick'Em Challenge, Steam.tv chat flairs, coin challenges, and with unlimited graffiti opportunities in-game for the duration of the event.

You will upgrade your Shanghai 2024 Coin by completing the coin challenges. Earn a Souvenir Token every time you upgrade your Coin.

This viewer pass will pre-activate your Shanghai 2024 Coin with 3 Souvenir Tokens.

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this pass support the participating organizations.
